tailored_summary: Progressive IT Leader with 15+ years of experience managing cross-functional delivery teams and strategic programs ranging from $250K to $3M in Financial Services environments. Proven track record of driving execution in matrixed organizations, leading process improvement initiatives, and serving as the face of IT for business stakeholders at all levels. Experienced change agent who leads with problem-solving discipline across Agile, Waterfall, and iterative delivery frameworks — managing blended teams of vendor and FTE resources both onshore and offshore. PMP and CSM certified.

selected_bullets.title: IT Delivery Manager
selected_bullets.bullet: Led successful delivery and execution of strategic IT programs ranging from $250K to $3M in a matrixed environment, coordinating 30+ application teams across onshore and offshore resources.

selected_bullets.title: IT Delivery Manager
selected_bullets.bullet: Served as the face of IT for business stakeholders at all levels, driving communications and alignment across enterprise technology and business units throughout all stages of the project lifecycle.

selected_bullets.title: IT Delivery Manager
selected_bullets.bullet: Provided structure and leadership to blended project teams comprised of vendor and FTE resources both onshore and offshore, ensuring accountability and high-quality solution delivery.

selected_bullets.title: Service Delivery Consultant / Tech Team Manager
selected_bullets.bullet: Managed a 14-member team of business analysts and developers in a Financial Services matrixed environment, making hiring decisions that directly influenced team synergy and delivery performance.

selected_bullets.title: Service Delivery Consultant / Tech Team Manager
selected_bullets.bullet: Facilitated annual planning sessions with business partners and led cross-team delivery for projects ranging from $250K to $1.5M, acting as a change agent to align technology execution with strategic business priorities.

selected_bullets.title: Service Delivery Consultant / Tech Team Manager
selected_bullets.bullet: Managed delivery teams using Agile, Waterfall, and iterative project methods, facilitating requirements sessions with business partners and test planning sessions with QA teams to drive high-quality outcomes.

selected_bullets.title: Technical Project Team Manager
selected_bullets.bullet: Led technical teams through all phases of the SDLC in a matrixed Financial Services environment, managing contractors, consultants, and FTEs located across the US and internationally.
